metadata.title: COLHYBRI — Financial Inclusion Through Local Commerce
metadata.description: COLHYBRI connects financially excluded individuals with local shops through an affordable subscription, creating a community-powered financial ecosystem.

hero.headline: Every pound spent locally strengthens your community
hero.subheadline: COLHYBRI connects financially excluded individuals with neighbourhood shops through a simple, affordable subscription. Together, we build financial inclusion from the ground up.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.headline: Doing Our Part — Like the Hummingbird
mission.description: In a Native American legend, while the forest burns, the hummingbird carries water drop by drop. When asked why, it replies: "I am doing my part." COLHYBRI embodies this spirit — small actions by many create massive collective impact.

inclusion.title: Financial Inclusion
inclusion.description: Many adults in the UK lack access to basic banking services, and millions more are financially excluded. COLHYBRI provides affordable access to essential financial services — no credit check, no minimum balance.

commerce.title: Local Commerce
commerce.description: Local shops become community financial hubs. Every transaction through COLHYBRI strengthens the neighbourhood economy through the Keynesian multiplier effect.

community.title: Community Power
community.description: When individuals and shops connect through COLHYBRI, money circulates locally, boosting local economic activity.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.headline: Three Simple Steps to Financial Inclusion

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.description: Individuals join for an affordable monthly fee. No credit check, no bank account needed. Instant access to the COLHYBRI community financial network.

connect.title: Connect Locally
connect.description: Shops join and become community financial hubs. They offer COLHYBRI services alongside their existing business.

thrive.title: Thrive Together
thrive.description: Every transaction strengthens the local economy. Money circulating locally multiplies its impact through the Keynesian multiplier effect.

impact.title: Impact
impact.headline: The Keynesian Multiplier in Action
impact.description: Every pound that circulates locally multiplies its value in economic activity. COLHYBRI channels spending into local commerce, creating jobs and strengthening communities.

jobsCreated.label: Per 200 active subscribers in a neighbourhood

moneyLocal.label: Share of spending stays in the community

miami.title: UK Launch 2026
miami.headline: COLHYBRI Launches in the UK — Revitalising the High Street
miami.description: The United Kingdom faces a growing cost of living crisis and many adults remain without access to a basic bank account. With its proud tradition of high street commerce and community-minded credit unions, the UK is an ideal launchpad for COLHYBRI's mission.

whyMiami.title: Why the UK?
reasons: Many adults in the UK lack access to basic banking services
A large, diverse population with significant financially excluded communities
Thriving high street ecosystem with hundreds of thousands of independent local shops
Strong credit union tradition and growing demand for community-based financial solutions

forIndividuals.title: For Individuals
forIndividuals.headline: Financial Freedom Starts Here
forIndividuals.description: No bank account? No problem. COLHYBRI gives you access to essential financial services through your neighbourhood shops. Save, spend, and build your financial future — all for an affordable monthly subscription.

forShops.title: For Local Shops
forShops.headline: Your Shop, Your Community's Financial Hub
forShops.description: Join COLHYBRI and transform your business into a community financial centre. Increase footfall, build customer loyalty, and make a real difference in your neighbourhood.

forCities.title: For Councils
forCities.headline: Revitalise the High Street with COLHYBRI
forCities.description: Local authorities partnering with COLHYBRI see measurable increases in local economic activity. Our platform strengthens the commercial fabric of neighbourhoods while advancing financial inclusion goals.

benefits.multiplier: Measurable increase in local economic activity through the Keynesian multiplier effect
benefits.inclusion: Advance financial inclusion goals for underbanked and unbanked residents
benefits.fabric: Strengthen the commercial fabric of neighbourhoods and support local businesses
benefits.dashboard: Real-time impact dashboard tracking jobs, spending, and community growth

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.headline: The COLHYBRI Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: COLHYBRI is part of the ONLYMORE Group, a technology company dedicated to financial inclusion through local commerce. Our ecosystem connects individuals, local shops, and local authorities.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.description: Access essential financial services through your neighbourhood shops.

shops.title: Local Shops
shops.description: Become a community financial hub and increase your customer traffic.

cities.title: Cities & Governments
cities.description: Strengthen your local economy through the Keynesian multiplier effect.

investors.title: Investors
investors.headline: Invest in Financial Inclusion
investors.description: COLHYBRI combines a solid business model with massive social impact. We're seeking partners who share our vision of financial inclusion through local commerce.

questions.a: COLHYBRI is a financial inclusion platform that connects financially excluded individuals with local shops through an affordable subscription. It creates a community-powered financial ecosystem where money circulates locally, strengthening local economies through the Keynesian multiplier effect.
Pricing will be announced soon. COLHYBRI is designed to be affordable for both individuals and local shops. There will be no hidden fees, no credit checks, and no minimum balance requirements.

questions.q: Do I need a bank account to use COLHYBRI?
questions.a: No. COLHYBRI is specifically designed for people who are financially excluded or lack access to mainstream banking. You can access financial services through participating local shops in your neighbourhood.

questions.q: Where is COLHYBRI launching in the UK?
questions.a: COLHYBRI is launching across the United Kingdom in 2026. The UK was chosen because of its significant financially excluded population and its vibrant high street commerce ecosystem.
COLHYBRI is created by ONLYMORE Group, led by founder and CEO Florent Gibert.

questions.q: What is the Keynesian multiplier effect?
questions.a: The Keynesian multiplier describes how money spent locally generates additional economic activity. With COLHYBRI, every subscription creates multiplied local economic value as money circulates through the community.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.description: Interested in COLHYBRI? Whether you're an individual, a local shop owner, a council representative, or an investor, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.quote: "I am doing my part." — Native American Legend (The Hummingbird)

thirdPlace.subheadline: Social trust is collapsing worldwide. Financial exclusion and loneliness feed each other. COLHYBRI builds community through financial inclusion.
